name: generate_xlsx
description:
Create or replace a professional XLSX (Excel) spreadsheet at the specified path within a registered source directory.

Use this tool when the user asks to create or update an Excel spreadsheet. Design clean, well-structured sheets with appropriate formatting.

Capabilities:
- Multiple named sheets with optional tab colors
- Sheet-level title bar and notes row
- Column headers with auto-filter and freeze panes
- Rich cell styling: bold, italic, alignment, colors, number formats, text wrap
- Formula cells (e.g. "=SUM(B2:B8)")
- Alternating row shading for readability
- Charts: bar, column, line, pie, scatter, area, doughnut, radar

Cell value formats:
- Primitive values: strings, numbers, booleans are auto-formatted
- Styled cells: use an object with properties like `{ "value": 1200, "num_format": "$#,##0", "bold": true }`
- Formula cells: `{ "formula": "=SUM(B2:B8)", "bold": true }`

Chart tips:
- Place charts after data rows using `position: { row: <after-last-data-row>, col: 0 }`
- Reference data with ranges like "B2:B10" or "$B$2:$B$10"
- Set `categories_range` for axis labels

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must end in .xlsx and be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the XLSX spreadsheet.

sheets.description: Array of worksheet definitions. At least one sheet is required.

name.description: Sheet tab name (max 31 chars, no special characters like /\?*[]).

title.description: Title row merged across all columns with dark background. Optional.

notes.description: Notes row below title with light background. Optional.

headers.description: Column headers rendered with blue background and white text.

rows.description: Data rows. Each row is an array of cell values.

items.description:
Cell value: a string, number, boolean, or a styled object.
Styled object properties:
- value: the cell value (string/number/boolean)
- formula: Excel formula string (e.g. "=SUM(B2:B8)")
- num_format: number format (e.g. "$#,##0", "0.00%", "yyyy-mm-dd")
- bold: boolean
- italic: boolean
- align: "left" | "center" | "right"
- font_color: hex color (e.g. "FF0000")
- background_color: hex color (e.g. "EAF3FB")
- wrap: boolean (text wrap)

column_widths.description: Explicit column widths in character units. Default: auto-calculated from header length.

tab_color.description: Sheet tab color as hex (e.g. "2E75B6"). Optional.

freeze_rows.description: Number of rows to freeze at the top. Default: auto-freeze at header row.

autofilter.description: Enable auto-filter on header row. Default: true when headers are present.

charts.description: Charts to embed in this sheet.

title.description: Chart title displayed above the chart.

data_range.description: Cell range for data values, e.g. "B2:B10" or "$B$2:$B$10".

categories_range.description: Cell range for category (axis) labels, e.g. "A2:A10". Optional.

position.description: Where to place the chart on the sheet.

row.description: Row number (0-indexed). Default: after last data row.
